utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final solution contains all six items with detailed subfields. 'financing' includes method, down payment, interest rate, term, and fees—all expected details. 'legal_services' includes name, cost, and currency—fully specified. 'moving_services' includes service level, cost, currency, and packing_included—complete. 'setup_services' includes package type, cost, currency, and list of included utilities—complete. 'total_budget' includes a full cost breakdown with totals and currency—complete. Therefore, all items are included and fully specified.
